queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how negative checking account balances contribute to determinants of default and elevate credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Investigating the impact of lacking a checking account on credit risk drivers and the probability of loan default.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical assessment of how minimal savings account balances below 100 DM correlate with reduced credit default risk.
